title: Maine: no general deletion right (ISP privacy only)
summary: Maine has not enacted a comprehensive consumer-privacy law with a general right to delete; its main privacy law restricts what internet service providers can do with customer data. For removal of broker listings, use the data broker's own opt-out (below).
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed. Maine's law focuses on internet providers — verify whether broader rights have since been enacted.
